gold.title: Interactive Bento Gallery
gold.reason: Full interactive bento-grid gallery with Framer Motion expand/collapse, media type support, title and description — a complete, production-ready gallery section for portfolios and product showcases.

gold.title: Dock
gold.reason: Reference MacOS dock implementation with React + Tailwind + Framer Motion magnification effect — polished, widely cited, excellent for app-style navigation in SaaS products.

gold.title: Limelight Nav
gold.reason: Spotlight-highlight navigation bar with smooth indicator animation — modern, production-ready primary navigation component suitable for SaaS and portfolio sites.

gold.title: Modern Mobile Menu
gold.reason: Mobile-optimized bottom navigation menu with icon set and accent color customization — production-ready mobile nav essential for responsive website redesigns.

gold.title: Fluid menu
gold.reason: Circular expanding fluid menu with smooth icon transitions — visually distinctive and polished; works as a floating action menu for SaaS dashboards and portfolios.

gold.title: Dock
gold.reason: Versatile, customizable dock with flexible menu item organization — clean API and strong documentation make it immediately production-usable.

gold.title: Liquid Glass
gold.reason: Liquid glass morphism dock — cutting-edge iOS-inspired aesthetic; visually impressive and on-trend for premium SaaS and portfolio sites.

silver.title: Dock
silver.reason: Cult UI dock implementation — quality MacOS-style dock; solid but overlaps with dillionverma variant.

silver.title: Dock Tabs
silver.reason: Tab-style dock navigation — useful hybrid between tabs and dock; good for multi-section SaaS pages.

silver.title: Animated Dock
silver.reason: Dock with grow-on-hover icon animations — clean and functional; good secondary navigation option.

silver.title: Dock
silver.reason: Ruixen dock variant — polished, another quality MacOS-style dock implementation.

silver.title: Magnetic Dock
silver.reason: Magnetic cursor-attraction dock — interactive and engaging; good for premium sites.

silver.title: Gooey Dock
silver.reason: Gooey blob-merge animation dock — visually striking and fun; works for creative/startup sites.

silver.title: Dock Morph
silver.reason: Morphing dock transitions — smooth animated shape changes; distinctive and modern.

silver.title: Apple Dock
silver.reason: Apple-style dock implementation — clean and recognizable; another quality variant.

silver.title: Magnetic Dock
silver.reason: Magnetic interaction dock — good interactive feel; overlaps with ruixen magnetic variant.

silver.title: Expanding Search Dock Shadcnui
silver.reason: Dock with expanding search input using shadcn — practical combination of dock and search for SaaS nav.

silver.title: Morphing Card Stack
silver.reason: Card stack with morphing expand — interesting content display pattern; usable for feature or testimonial sections.

bronze.title: Dock
bronze.reason: Second dock variant from same author — cool animation but redundant given the interactive bento gallery from the same author already ranks Gold.

bronze.title: Dock
bronze.reason: Basic dock implementation — minimal differentiation from higher-quality variants; limited added value.

bronze.title: Mac Os Dock
bronze.reason: MacOS dock clone — another variant; oversaturated category with better alternatives already present.

bronze.title: Message Dock
bronze.reason: Message/chat-specific dock — too app-specific; limited use for general website redesign.

bronze.title: Minimal Dock
bronze.reason: Minimal dock — very stripped-down; lacks visual impact needed for production website sections.

bronze.title: Docks
bronze.reason: Generic docks collection — overlaps with individual ruixen dock entries; redundant.

bronze.title: Tilted Dock
bronze.reason: Tilted/angled dock — niche stylistic choice; hard to integrate naturally into standard layouts.
